input.prompt:
I need to understand the response shapes of the read-only GET endpoints in /Users/adrian.asher/IdeaProjects/agent-hal/lambdas/admin-api/index.mjs. This file is ~4000 lines.

For each of these endpoints, find the handler code and document the response body shape (what fields are returned):

1. GET /api/runs - list runs (look for pagination, search params, response fields)
2. GET /api/runs/{runId} - single run detail
3. GET /api/runs/{runId}/log - parsed log entries
4. GET /api/runs/{runId}/reviews - list skill reviews
5. GET /api/runs/{runId}/reviews/{name} - single review content
6. GET /api/stats - aggregated stats
7. GET /api/stats/trends - weekly trends
8. GET /api/stats/snapshot - cached snapshot
9. GET /api/projects - list projects
10. GET /api/cron-jobs - list cron jobs
11. GET /api/cron-jobs/{jobId}/runs - runs for cron job
12. GET /api/audit-log - audit entries
13. GET /api/ticket-reviews - list reviews
14. GET /api/ticket-reviews/{id} - single review
15. GET /api/ticket-reviews/{id}/children - child reviews
16. GET /api/config - global config
17. GET /api/prompts - agent prompts

For each, note:
- Query parameters accepted (page, q, since, etc.)
- Response JSON shape (field names and types)
- Any special notes (admin-only fields, signed URLs, etc.)

Be thorough - I need this to write an OpenAPI spec.
